perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a shopping cart at a checkout counter filled with food products, overlaid with large, colorful text titles. (2) It transitions into a rapid montage showing various Costco items: Japanese wagyu beef packs, ready-to-eat bento boxes, Gillette razor sets, an Electrolux dehumidifier, and a Sharp refrigerator. (3) The scene shifts to the warehouse interior featuring 'Black Friday' signage and various price tags marked with the number '5', including those for luxury jewelry, vacuum cleaners, and monitors. (4) Further shots show Puma boxers, mattresses, gaming chairs, Calvin Klein underwear, and large packs of feminine hygiene products. (5) It continues with kitchenware like non-stick pans, LG speakers, and Dyson fans. (6) High-volume household goods like Kleenex toilet paper and Ariel laundry pods are shown stacked in aisles. (7) Towards the end, there is a shot of the Costco store exterior from the road, followed by a fast-paced 'walk-through' POV of the warehouse aisles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic background music begins. A male narrator's voice, energetic and high-pitched, starts speaking in Mandarin, introducing a guide to Costco's Black Friday deals. (2) The music maintains a constant upbeat rhythm. The narrator lists categories of discounted items, such as food and daily necessities, with each category corresponding to visual changes. (3) The narration transitions into 'Strategy' segments (1 through 5), explaining how to identify the best price tags and which limited items to secure. (4) Subtle ambient warehouse sounds and the rattle of a shopping cart are occasionally audible under the music and voiceover. (5) The video concludes with the narrator providing a final summary and a call to action, accompanied by a final musical crescendo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook: 'COSTCO 年度最殺 好市多 黑色星期五攻略' (Costco's best of the year, Costco Black Friday Strategy). (2) Functional: '我幫大家整理了 去年黑色星期五 大概300樣特價商品' (I've organized about 300 sale items from last year's Black Friday). (3) Decorative: '攻略 1: 看到黑標 = 全年最低價' (Strategy 1: Black label equals the lowest price of the year). (4) Functional: Various price tags showing original vs. discounted prices, e.g., '$35,599', '-12,000'. (5) Decorative: '想補貨 想省錢 趕這七天去好市多' (Want to restock, want to save money, hurry to Costco these seven days).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Montage -> Strategic Advice -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 pair of hands at checkout, 4 shoppers seen from afar in aisles
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: None (The narrator is off-screen; only hands are occasionally visible).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Internal aisles of a large Costco warehouse filled with high shelves, bulk products, and promotional Black Friday banners. Exterior shots show the building facade and parking lot area.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a strategic shopping guide for the Costco Black Friday event. It aims to inform viewers about specific discount patterns (the 'black label' tip) and high-value items (electronics and luxury goods) while creating a sense of urgency. The intent is to drive store traffic by providing actionable 'insider' advice combined with visual proof of significant price reductions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides a specific roadmap for shopping at a single retailer (Costco) and highlights multiple brand-name products available there to encourage store visits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density text overlays and rapid-fire Mandarin narration typical of 'Life Hack' or 'Shopping Consultant' social media accounts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'Fear of Missing Out' (FOMO) by emphasizing the once-a-year nature of the sale and the speed at which items sell out.
